<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused. -->

## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` and `go build -tags libsql ./...` pass
- [ ] `go vet ./...` and `gofmt -l .` (empty) pass
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes; integration tests added/updated for new query paths
- [ ] Examples regenerated if the codegen emitter changed
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `docs/prd.md`) for public API or behavior changes
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything tricky, trade-offs, or follow-ups.
